title: IndustryOR
description: Evaluate the configured model on CardinalOperations/IndustryOR by generating coptpy formulations and checking the resulting optimal value.
baseline_summary: Checked-in IndustryOR wrapper that defines dataset settings and the prompting policy used to generate coptpy code.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. This file is the IndustryOR wrapper. Preserve def build_run_config(), SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_user_prompt(question), and RUN_CONFIG = build_run_config(). The benchmark evaluates the wrapper by using it to prompt the model for each OR question.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact optimal-value match rate is better.
